author: clthuang
name: Corrupted Context + EMA + QAT + Per-Group Int6 Bit-Packed
blurb: 11L/4x LeakyReLU(0.5)² (32.7M params) + BigramHash(3072,112) + XSA all 11 layers + Value Residual + U-Net skips + EMA(0.997) + 10% corrupted context + late QAT + per-group-64 int6 bit-packed quantization + lzma. Partial RoPE 16/64, warmdown=3500, Muon WD=0.04.
technique_summary: Corrupted context 10% + EMA(0.997) + late QAT + per-group-64 int6 bit-packed + lzma + 4x MLP + XSA-all + Partial RoPE + Muon WD=0.04
